description: Token sync agent — exports Figma variables to Style Dictionary JSON or CSS custom properties via figma-cli.

output.output_path: TODO: set to your token output directory (e.g. 'tokens/tokens.json')

env.TOKEN_OUTPUT_PATH: TODO: path to write exported token file

notes: figma-cli connects via local CDP daemon — no Figma API token required.
Run 'figma-cli connect' (Yolo mode) before invoking this agent.
For CI use: set connection_mode to 'safe'; set TOKEN_OUTPUT_PATH for automated commits.
